repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #92902 by narrowing investigation to the failing Real behavior proof for replacement channel config schema ownership. Preserve @YonganZhang credit and keep the existing two-file scope unless the failing proof shows an adjacent minimal test harness update is required.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(config): repair replacement channel schema ownership
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair the #92902 replacement channel config schema fix so Real behavior proof passes.
- Preserve the intended behavior from @YonganZhang's source PR: replacement channel plugins that declare `preferOver` keep ownership of active channel config schemas deterministically.
- Keep the patch focused on config metadata and regression coverage unless the failing proof identifies a minimal adjacent harness update.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92902
Fixes: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/92884
Credit: based on @YonganZhang's contributor PR #92902.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/validation.channel-metadata.test.ts src/plugins/channel-plugin-ids.test.ts src/cli/config-cli.test.ts src/config/runtime-schema.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- rerun Real behavior proof for #92902
- `/review`
credit_notes: Preserve contributor attribution in any repair PR body and final merge notes.
